message:
🐛 Return pending_review count in ListFeatureRequests (#10174) (#10190)

ListFeatureRequests now returns {"items": [...], "total": N, "pending_review": M}
instead of a bare array. This lets the frontend distinguish "no submissions"
from "submissions pending review" when a user has only untriaged requests.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
